hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(1) if f.endswith('/.env') else sys.exit(0)" || { echo 'Blocked: .env is gitignored and contains real secrets. Edit .env.example instead.'; exit 1; }

python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); venv=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(f).split('.claude')[0].rstrip('/'), '') if '.claude' in f else ''; py='/Users/matthewwagner/Desktop/Projects/rag-quest/.venv/bin/python3'; (f.endswith('.py') and os.path.exists(f) and os.path.exists(py)) and [subprocess.run([py,'-m','black','--quiet',f],check=False), subprocess.run([py,'-m','isort','--quiet',f],check=False)]" 2>/dev/null || true
